overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing a bald character in a dark coat walking through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night. The journey progresses from narrow green-lit alleys down stairs and through an underpass into a wide street dense with vertical neon signage, featuring heavy rain and reflective wet surfaces throughout.

external AC units mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, rain-slicked alley enclosed by buildings with green metal shutters and red wooden doors. Green neon signs illuminate the scene from above as the character passes a food stall with plastic chairs stacked outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending alleyway with stairs and scattered debris

enters darker passage with red neon glow visible ahead

entered.detail: weathered concrete stairs descending to lower level
metal chain-link fencing along the left wall
green metal trash bins and garbage containers
scattered trash and debris on the wet ground

segments.scene_description: The character descends concrete stairs into a darker, more decrepit section of the alley. Chain-link fencing lines the walls and wooden pallets are stacked among scattered debris, with rain falling steadily in the dimly lit passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass with blue neon strips leading to main commercial street

exits underpass into wide street with dense vertical neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking through the underpass and emerging onto a main street lined with tall neon signs

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi parked on the side of the street near the underpass exit

tall vertical neon signs with Asian characters in pink and blue
elevated highway or train overpass with concrete supports

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an underpass bathed in blue neon light, then emerges onto a wider main street. Tall vertical neon signs with Asian characters tower above, and a yellow taxi is parked near the exit as the rain continues to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: main commercial street with dense neon signage and parked vehicles

events.description: approaches and passes a parked red sedan on the right

agents.ego_description: walking down the neon-lit main street, turning right at an intersection and passing parked cars

notable_agents.action: red sedan parked at the curb on the right side of the street

entered.detail: long horizontal blue neon light strip running along the building facade
circular traffic sign with red border indicating no parking
white and orange striped traffic barriers

segments.scene_description: The character walks down the wide main street surrounded by towering neon signs in pink and blue, then turns right at an intersection. A red sedan is parked on the right side of the wet street as the character continues through the rain-soaked cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic, green-lit alleyway into a sprawling, neon-drenched cyberpunk thoroughfare. It begins by trailing the character through a narrow, rain-slicked passage lined with green metal shutters and red wooden doors, passing a food stall with stacked plastic chairs. As the character descends concrete stairs, the environment shifts into a darker, more decrepit zone characterized by chain-link fencing and scattered wooden pallets. The scene then opens as the character moves through a blue-lit underpass and emerges onto a wide main street dominated by towering vertical neon signs and a parked yellow taxi. Finally, the camera follows the character down the expansive, wet street amidst pink and blue lights before turning right at an intersection past a parked red sedan.
